creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:41:12 2014
New Revision: 355221
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355221
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355221/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, sort *_DEPENDS
  
  PR:		ports/189586
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Google-Checkout/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Google-Checkout/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Google-Checkout/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:41:07 2014	(r355220)
+++ head/devel/p5-Google-Checkout/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:41:12 2014	(r355221)
@@ -7,15 +7,18 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl implementation of Google Checkout (GCO)
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-libwww>=5.65:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
-		p5-XML-Simple>=2.09:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Simple \
-		p5-Crypt-SSLeay>=0.45:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Crypt-SSLeay \
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Crypt-SSLeay>=0.45:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Crypt-SSLeay \
 		p5-Date-Manip>=5.40:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Date-Manip \
 		p5-Digest-HMAC>=1.01:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-HMAC \
-		p5-XML-Writer>=0.6:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Writer
+		p5-XML-Simple>=2.09:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Simple \
+		p5-XML-Writer>=0.6:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Writer \
+		p5-libwww>=5.65:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
 BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5
